spots.title: Wire the deployment manifest to the DeepBook SDK client
spots.prompt:
The deployment manifest has been fetched. Now you need to wire it into the DeepBook SDK client.

Your task: implement the three helper functions (`packageIds`, `coinMap`, `poolMap`) that extract the SDK configuration from the manifest, then build the `SuiGrpcClient` and attach the `deepbook` extension.

You are configuring for pool: {{ pool_subset }}.

Lines 39–58 of `src/App.tsx` are the target. Use `packageIds(manifest)`, `coinMap(manifest)`, and `poolMap(manifest)` as arguments to the `deepbook(...)` call.

spots.title: Wrap SDK calls with withRetry for resilience
spots.prompt:
The DeepBook gRPC simulation calls can fail transiently. Implement the `withRetry` helper that wraps an async call and retries up to a configurable number of times before propagating the error.

Lines 103–114 of `src/App.tsx` are the target. The helper must retry on any thrown error and surface the last error after all attempts are exhausted.

phases.title: Phase 3 — Polling loop with failure tolerance

spots.title: Implement the polling tick with consecutive-failure tolerance
spots.prompt:
Implement the polling tick: midPrice + getLevel2TicksFromMid every {{ poll_interval_ms }} ms; surface error only after 3 consecutive failures.

Lines 116–145 of `src/App.tsx` are the target. Use `setInterval` with `{{ poll_interval_ms }}` as the interval. Track consecutive failures in a counter — only surface the error to the UI state after 3 consecutive failures. Reset the counter on each successful poll.
